org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config.DefaultConfig

Packages that use DefaultConfig
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources
Predefined Jetty Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (microservice-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources
Predefined Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.petstore.jetty
Apache Juneau Petstore - Jetty/Microservice deployment.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest
Petstore REST resources.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.springboot
Apache Juneau Petstore - Spring Boot deployment.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config
Predefined REST configuration interfaces
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
Built-in health, readiness, and liveness probe support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer
Micrometer bridge for the juneau-rest-server MetricsRecorder SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.rdf.config
Predefined REST resource configuration interfaces that add RDF (Jena) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.remote
Remote service API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot
Spring Boot Integration

    Description

    Class
    Description
    class 
    ConfigResource
    Shows contents of the microservice configuration file.
    class

    LogsResource
    REST resource for viewing and accessing log files.

    SampleRootResource
    Sample root REST resource.

    ShutdownResource
    Provides the capability to shut down this REST microservice through a REST call.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PetFreemarkerViewResource
    Petstore FreeMarker view demo.
    class 
    PetMustacheViewResource
    Petstore Mustache view demo.
    class 
    PetSecureResource
    Secure analogue of PetStoreResource demonstrating Juneau's BearerTokenGuard + StubBearerTokenValidator pattern.
    class 
    PetStoreResource
    Petstore CRUD REST resource.
    class 
    PetstoreUiResource
    Petstore React SPA demo — serves the no-build single-page React UI from the core classpath.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HelloResource
    Tiny REST resource that demonstrates Spring @Autowired injection into a Juneau @Rest servlet under a Spring Boot deployment.

    RootResources
    Root router resource for the Spring Boot deployment.

  • Uses of DefaultConfig in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config

    Subinterfaces of DefaultConfig in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    BasicJson5Config
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports JSON 5 transport.
    interface 
    BasicJsonConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports JSON transport.
    interface 
    BasicJsonHtmlConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports JSON and HTML transport.
    interface 
    BasicOpenApiConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports OpenAPI transport.
    interface 
    BasicPrototextConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports Protobuf Text Format transport.
    interface 
    BasicTomlConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports TOML transport.
    interface 
    BasicUniversalConfig
    Predefined configuration for a REST resource that supports all languages and provides common default configuration values.
    interface 
    BasicYamlConfig
    Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports YAML transport.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BasicRestResource
    Identical to BasicRestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    class 
    BasicRestResourceGroup
    Identical to BasicRestServletGroup but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
    class 
    BasicRestServlet
    Subclass of RestServlet with default settings and standard endpoints defined.
    class 
    BasicRestServletGroup
    Specialized subclass of BasicRestServlet for showing "group" pages.
